_comment: Shared roommate/household config — the single source of truth for WHO is commuting. The dashboard seeds its default 'Who's commuting' list from this (export_housing_data.py embeds it as defaultPeople), and the scrape is sized for this household: 1 person -> rooms/studios/1bd, n people -> larger multi-bedroom homes (searches.json apartment searches run up to ~$6000 all-in so group-sized homes are captured). Supports 1..n people. The dashboard's '⧉ Copy as scrape config' button copies the visitor's current household here.
